summary: Senior data scientist and PhD candidate in Informatics Engineering (UTFSM, thesis defense expected in 2026) with over 10 years of experience in Python, machine learning, natural language processing (NLP), computer vision, and big data analytics. Research focused on trustworthy AI and causal machine learning, with publications in high-impact journals including Scientific Reports (Nature Portfolio) and Algorithms (MDPI). In industry, specialized in optimizing e-commerce operations and forecasting with state-of-the-art models such as TFT, NHITS, NBEATS, and LightGBM, consistently achieving forecast accuracies above 90%. Skilled at communicating complex findings to cross-functional teams: 1st and 3rd place finishes in international data science competitions, keynote speaker at events such as FLISOL, and featured on the ProinChile podcast on Spotify. Strong command of NLP techniques (embeddings and semantic similarity between concepts), prompt engineering with rules and MCP, pattern detection, and computer vision (image segmentation, OCR, object detection).

description: Develop advanced machine learning models to optimize e-commerce operations, improving inventory and sales forecasting accuracy with state-of-the-art models such as TFT, NHITS, NBEATS, and LightGBM

Collaborate with international teams to define priority air cargo strategies and develop prioritization models, achieving forecast accuracies consistently above 90% and increasing logistics efficiency by 20%

Developed and implemented a machine learning ensemble model for time series, adopted by multiple teams, that outperformed Meta's Prophet model by up to 10 percentage points in forecast accuracy, significantly improving data-driven decision making
Led the development of predictive models for national and imported product sales, improving accuracy in promotions, coupons, and store distribution, with errors below 5% MAPE
Directed the Catman forecasting team, delivering analytical solutions that optimized product placement and sales strategies in new sales centers in Peru
Presented actionable insights to stakeholders, connecting technical and business teams
Monitored and validated credit risk models, preparing detailed performance reports
Developed customer prospecting models, improving acquisition strategies
Built a qualitative model to analyze company operations, identifying growth opportunities and creating KPIs to monitor executive performance
Led research on customer behavior, delivering hyper-personalized dashboards that reduced customer churn by 30% and increased profitability
Wrote two articles for the company's official blog, explaining key findings in an accessible manner. [Link.](https://blog.capitaria.com/como-perder-en-el-trading)

experience.company: Ministry of Transportation and Telecommunications, Chile
description: Led the technical counterpart in public tenders, including the 'Foreign Trade Logistics Barometer 2020' project. [Link.](https://www.observatoriologistico.cl/estudios/estudio-actualizacion-y-aplicacion-del-barometro-de-la-logistica-de-comercio-exterior-2020?id=5db6eecd5f5d64004bf74e59)
Developed port cargo prediction models with a mean squared error below 1%, delivered directly to the Transportation Undersecretariat
Served as interim lead of the analytics area for Chile and Peru, reorganizing teams after the impact of COVID using agile methodologies
Developed scrapers for public market data and used transparency law data to create a tender alert system, achieving a competitive advantage of several months
Developed OCR systems to automate visual verification (captcha) steps in public data collection
Developed NLP models to detect patterns in public markets
Conducted brain connectivity analysis through the combined use of functional MRI and tractography (FONDECYT project ACT 1161427)
Developed an ant colony algorithm for image edge detection, applied to artifact segmentation in brain MRI
Developed predictive models for concrete compressive strength using multilayer perceptrons optimized with grid search
Analyzed heavy metals in drinking water using X-ray fluorescence techniques

publications.title: Epistemic Frontiers and the Distinction between Causality, Information, and Predictability in Pattern Recognition
publications.description: Epistemological framework distinguishing causality, statistical dependence, and predictive effects in pattern recognition, clarifying why high predictive accuracy does not imply causal understanding.

publications.title: Attribute Relevance Score: A Novel Measure for Identifying Attribute Importance
publications.description: Research on a new measure for identifying attribute importance in datasets.

publications.title: Prediction of Concrete Compressive Strength through Artificial Neural Networks

publications.title: Guide: Non-Linear Feature Generation with GPlearn
publications.description: Practical guide for generating non-linear features using the GPlearn library.

publications.description: Research on the use of convolutional neural networks for automatic dyslexia detection.
